lyrics.trans: Kangxi:

lyrics.pinyin: Wǒ zhēn de tèbié ài nǐ
lyrics.trans: I really love you so much
Why are you shedding tears
Why are you shedding tears
Why are you shedding tears

lyrics.pinyin: Wǒ zhēn de tèbié ài nǐ
lyrics.trans: I really love you so much
Promise me you won't cry anymore
In this world
There is not much time left

lyrics.pinyin: Néng ràng wǒ duì nǐ sīniàn
lyrics.trans: For me to miss you

lyrics.pinyin: Wǒ zhēn de tèbié ài nǐ
lyrics.trans: I really love you so much
Why are you shedding tears
Why are you shedding tears
Why are you shedding tears

lyrics.pinyin: Wǒ zhēn de tèbié ài nǐ
lyrics.trans: I really love you so much
Promise me you won't cry anymore
In this world
There is not much time left

lyrics.pinyin: Néng ràng wǒ duì nǐ sīniàn
lyrics.trans: For me to miss you
The world has changed
But you still haven't changed
I have already fallen for someone else

lyrics.pinyin: Kàn xiànzài chuāngwài dōu biàn lěng
lyrics.trans: Look, it's getting cold outside the window now
How long has it been since we last met
I chose to have no bottom line

lyrics.pinyin: Wǒ zhēn de tèbié hèn nǐ
lyrics.trans: I really hate you so much
You know

lyrics.pinyin: Wǒ zhēn de tèbié ài nǐ
lyrics.trans: I really love you so much
No bottom line

lyrics.pinyin: Duōnián hòu lùguò nǐ jiā ménkǒu
lyrics.trans: Passing by your house's door years later

lyrics.text: 我的肩膀趴着我们养的猫
lyrics.pinyin: Wǒ de jiānbǎng pāzhe wǒmen yǎng de māo
lyrics.trans: The cat we raised is resting on my shoulder
zzzzzzz
How sweet this dream is
E E E E E
How miserable it is after waking up

lyrics.text: 我的枕边本应该是你呢
lyrics.pinyin: Wǒ de zhěn biān běn yīnggāi shì nǐ ne
lyrics.trans: It should have been you beside my pillow

lyrics.text: 我是该学着不过度依赖着你了
lyrics.pinyin: Wǒ shì gāi xuézhe bù guòdù yīlàizhe nǐ le
lyrics.trans: I should learn not to over-rely on you

lyrics.pinyin: Cáng bù zhù yǎnlèi biànchéng jiǔjīng
lyrics.trans: The tears I couldn't hide turned into alcohol
Hurting me wasn't intentional
I have already forgiven her
The spinning flowers above my head
You, destroyed by tears
My heart is covered in scars
Tears have long spilled all over the floor

lyrics.pinyin: Wǒ zhēn de tèbié ài nǐ
lyrics.trans: I really love you so much
Why are you shedding tears
Why are you shedding tears
Why are you shedding tears

lyrics.pinyin: Wǒ zhēn de tèbié ài nǐ
lyrics.trans: I really love you so much
Promise me you won't cry anymore
In this world
There is not much time left

lyrics.pinyin: Néng ràng wǒ duì nǐ sīniàn
lyrics.trans: For me to miss you
The world has changed
But you still haven't changed
I have already fallen for someone else

lyrics.pinyin: Kàn xiànzài chuāngwài dōu biàn lěng
lyrics.trans: Look, it's getting cold outside the window now
How long has it been since we last met
I chose to have no bottom line
TOYOKI:
Why aren't you replying to my messages

lyrics.text: 我又不是hsh我又不会去绑你
lyrics.pinyin: Wǒ yòu bùshì hsh wǒ yòu bù huì qù bǎng nǐ
lyrics.trans: I'm not some gangster, I won't kidnap you

lyrics.text: 我才不会站在你家楼下傻傻等你
lyrics.pinyin: Wǒ cái bù huì zhàn zài nǐ jiā lóuxià shǎ shǎ děng nǐ
lyrics.trans: I wouldn't stand downstairs at your place waiting for you like a fool

lyrics.text: 要怎么表现你说什么我都不在意
lyrics.pinyin: Yào zěnme biǎoxiàn nǐ shuō shénme wǒ dōu bù zàiyì
lyrics.trans: How should I show that I don't care about whatever you say
Maybe it's my fault

lyrics.pinyin: Ràng nǐ chéngtiān zhěng yè de liúlèi
lyrics.trans: Making you cry all day and night

lyrics.pinyin: Wǒ zhēn de bùxiǎng nǐ liúlèi
lyrics.trans: I really don't want you to cry
What else is there to say

lyrics.pinyin: Yīqiè dōu shì wǒ de zìyǐwéi
lyrics.trans: Everything was just my own assumption

lyrics.text: 我甚至变不成你的眼泪
lyrics.pinyin: Wǒ shènzhì biàn bùchéng nǐ de yǎnlèi
lyrics.trans: I can't even turn into your tears
Just wanting to have you like this
How can I stay calm

lyrics.text: 要怎么 要怎么 要怎么保持冷静
lyrics.pinyin: Yào zěnme yào zěnme yào zěnme bǎochí lěngjìng
lyrics.trans: How, how, how can I stay calm
Tears are falling constantly

lyrics.pinyin: Nà shì shuí xīn suì de shēngyīn
lyrics.trans: Whose heartbreaking sound is that
